description: Extract application, operation.type, and correlation fields from span data

script.description: Split span.kind on '.' to extract application and operation.type
script.source: if (ctx.span != null && ctx.span.kind != null) { String kind = ctx.span.kind.toString(); String[] parts = kind.splitOnToken('.'); if (parts.length >= 2) { ctx.application = parts[0].toLowerCase(); if (ctx.operation == null) { ctx.operation = new HashMap(); } ctx.operation.type = parts[1]; } }

script.description: Extract correlation fields from Attributes to top-level for efficient querying
script.source: if (ctx.Attributes != null) { if (ctx.Attributes['correlation.event.start.id'] != null) { if (ctx.correlation == null) { ctx.correlation = new HashMap(); } ctx.correlation['event'] = new HashMap(); ctx.correlation.event['start'] = new HashMap(); ctx.correlation.event.start['id'] = ctx.Attributes['correlation.event.start.id']; } if (ctx.Attributes['correlation.event.end.id'] != null) { if (ctx.correlation == null) { ctx.correlation = new HashMap(); } if (ctx.correlation['event'] == null) { ctx.correlation['event'] = new HashMap(); } ctx.correlation.event['end'] = new HashMap(); ctx.correlation.event.end['id'] = ctx.Attributes['correlation.event.end.id']; } }
